title: XP-Health
description: XP-Health is a Minecraft datapack that ties a player's maximum health to their experience level. From level 0, players start with 5 hearts, and for every level up, their maximum health increases by half a heart. This scales up to a maximum of 255 hearts
body:
### XP-Health is a Minecraft datapack that dynamically scales a player's maximum health based on their experience level.
As players level up, their health steadily increases, starting from 5 hearts at level 0. Each subsequent level adds half a additional heart, up to a maximum of 255 hearts at level 500. Once players reach level 500, their experience points are reset to 0 and capped at level 500, preventing any further health increases beyond this point. This datapack provides a powerful incentive for players to continue exploring, fighting, and gaining experience, as their health grows with every level.
